name: compact
description:
Compacts the `value` by removing empty values, where empty values are defined using the
available parameters.

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The object or array to compact.

arguments.name: null
arguments.description: Whether null should be treated as an empty value.

arguments.name: string
arguments.description: Whether an empty string should be treated as an empty value.

arguments.name: object
arguments.description: Whether an empty object should be treated as an empty value.

arguments.name: array
arguments.description: Whether an empty array should be treated as an empty value.

arguments.name: nullish
arguments.description: Tests whether the value is "nullish" as defined by the [`is_nullish`](#is_nullish) function.

rules: The return type matches the `value` type.

examples.title: Compact an array
examples.source: compact(["foo", "bar", "", null, [], "buzz"], string: true, array: true, null: true)

examples.title: Compact an object
examples.source: compact({"field1": 1, "field2": "", "field3": [], "field4": null}, string: true, array: true, null: true)
